lines.lyric: I pressed play on the green phone booth
lines.real_meaning: The accidental genesis: You don't choose to change the world. You stumble into a phone booth you painted green because it looked cool, press a button, and nothing is ever the same.
media_queries: Wide shot: A battered green British phone booth standing alone in a misty twilight clearing, surrounded by ancient ferns and towering prehistoric trees.
Medium shot: A hand reaches out and presses a large glowing button inside the green phone booth. Light pulses through the cracked glass panels.
Close-up: The phone booth door swings open violently, revealing a swirling vortex of golden light and fog pouring out into the forest.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A cluttered suburban bedroom at night, clothes on the floor, rain against the window. A bored teenager sits on the bed staring at the ceiling.
Medium shot: The teenager spots a dusty old laptop under a pile of magazines on the desk. Pulls it out curiously.
Close-up: A finger presses the power button on the old silver laptop. The screen flickers to life with a pale blue glow.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A gênese acidental: Você não escolhe mudar o mundo. Você tropeça em uma cabine telefônica que pintou de verde porque parecia legal, aperta um botão e nada nunca mais é o mesmo.
lines.core_pt_pt: Tu tropeças no poder.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A gênese acidental: Não escolhes mudar o mundo. Tropeças num telefone público que pintaste de verde porque parecia fixe, carregas num botão e nada volta a ser igual.

lines.lyric: Painted a British box, that's the truth
lines.real_meaning: We dress up the mundane as extraordinary. A phone booth becomes a time machine because we decided it should. Every product, every brand, every ideology is just a painted box.
media_queries: Medium shot: The phone booth exterior, clearly hand-painted green with dripping paint and brush strokes visible on the red British metal.
Close-up: A bucket of green paint and a roller leaning against the base of the phone booth, grass stained green around it.
Wide shot: The traveler stands beside the freshly painted phone booth in a suburban garden, admiring the ridiculous work with a proud grin.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: The teenager sticks vinyl decal stickers onto the laptop lid, personalizing it with band logos and astronaut graphics.
Close-up: The laptop screen shows a browser homepage with a colorful custom wallpaper, tabs already opening.
Over-the-shoulder: The teenager types a first search query into the browser bar, the cursor blinking with possibility.
lines.core: Every brand is a painted box.
lines.core_pt: Cada marca é uma caixa pintada.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Vestimos o cotidiano como extraordinário. Uma cabine telefônica se torna uma máquina do tempo porque decidimos que deveria. Todo produto, toda marca, toda ideologia é apenas uma caixa pintada.
lines.core_pt_pt: Cada marca é uma caixa pintada.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Vestimos o vulgar como extraordinário. Uma cabina telefónica torna-se uma máquina do tempo porque decidimos que assim deve ser. Cada produto, cada marca, cada ideologia é apenas uma caixa pintada.

lines.lyric: Don't ask me why, I can't explain
lines.real_meaning: The honest confession: Most revolutions begin without a manifesto. We act, then invent the story later. 'Why did you do it?' 'I don't know. It seemed fun.'
media_queries: Close-up: The traveler's face mid-teleportation, eyes wide, mouth open, streaks of light whipping past like a tunnel of stars.
Wide shot: The phone booth shaking violently in the clearing, lightning arcing from its antenna into the prehistoric sky.
Medium shot: The traveler gripping the phone booth's interior handles as the whole structure lurches and spins.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: The teenager's face illuminated by rapidly scrolling search results, eyes darting left and right, mesmerized.
Medium shot: The teenager clicks a random link, leaning forward with curiosity, headphones half on.
Over-the-shoulder: A webpage loads showing 'CREATE YOUR ACCOUNT' with a blinking cursor in the username field.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A confissão honesta: A maioria das revoluções começa sem um manifesto. Agimos e depois inventamos a história mais tarde. 'Por que você fez isso?' 'Não sei. Pareceu divertido.
lines.core_pt_pt: Nós agimos primeiro, nunca explicamos.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A confissão honesta: A maioria das revoluções começa sem um manifesto. Agimos, e depois inventamos a história mais tarde. 'Por que o fizeste?' 'Não sei. Pareceu-me divertido.'

lines.lyric: Just wanted cool rocks, maybe a saber-toothed mane
lines.real_meaning: The trivial spark: Every empire begins with someone wanting something stupid. Fire wasn't discovered for philosophy — it was discovered because someone was cold and hungry.
media_queries: Medium shot: The traveler's backpack open on the ground, revealing a geology hammer, sample bags, and a dog-eared dinosaur field guide.
Close-up: A gloved hand picking up a glittering crystal from moss-covered stone, holding it up to fading twilight.
Wide shot: A distant silhouette of a saber-toothed cat on a ridge, backlit by a massive orange sunset over volcanic hills.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: The teenager scrolling through YouTube thumbnails, each promising 'INSANE', 'YOU WON'T BELIEVE', 'GONE WRONG'.
Close-up: The teenager's finger hovers over a clickbait video thumbnail showing a flashy tech review with fire emojis.
Over-the-shoulder: A video starts playing, a charismatic tech influencer holds up a shiny new gadget to the camera.
lines.core: Every empire starts with something stupid.
lines.core_pt: Todo império começa com algo idiota.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A faísca trivial: Todo império começa com alguém querendo algo bobo. O fogo não foi descoberto pela filosofia — foi descoberto porque alguém estava com frio e com fome.
lines.core_pt_pt: Todo o império começa com algo estúpido.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A faísca trivial: Todo o império começa com alguém a querer algo estúpido. O fogo não foi descoberto para a filosofia — foi descoberto porque alguém estava com frio e com fome.

lines.lyric: See a dinosaur before my tea
lines.real_meaning: Casual tourism of the sacred: We reduce the extraordinary to convenience. 'I'll see a miracle before lunch, then get a latte.' This is how wonder dies.
media_queries: Wide shot: A massive brontosaurus silhouette moving through thick fog between enormous redwood-like trees in a primeval swamp.
Medium shot: The traveler crouching behind a fallen log, jaw dropped, watching the dinosaur's enormous feet splash through shallow water.
Close-up: The traveler's wristwatch showing 4:47 PM, a teacup emoji sticker on the watch band, reality still tethered to routine.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The teenager's room at night, face glowing blue, surrounded by empty snack wrappers, completely absorbed in the screen.
Medium shot: A clock on the bedroom wall reads 2:00 AM, but the teenager doesn't notice, scrolling endlessly.
Close-up: The browser has twenty-seven tabs open, each one a rabbit hole deeper than the last.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Turismo casual do sagrado: reduzimos o extraordinário à conveniência. 'Verei um milagre antes do almoço, depois tomarei um latte.' Assim, a maravilha morre.
lines.core_pt_pt: A maravilha morre com a conveniência.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Turismo casual do sagrado: Reduzimos o extraordinário à conveniência. 'Vou ver um milagre antes do almoço, depois vou tomar um latte.' Assim é que a maravilha morre.

lines.lyric: A triceratops staring at me
lines.real_meaning: The moment reality stares back: When what you thought was entertainment becomes dangerously real. The dinosaur doesn't care about your itinerary.
media_queries: Wide shot: An enormous triceratops standing ten meters away in a clearing, its three horns gleaming, staring directly at the traveler.
Close-up: The triceratops' ancient, reptilian eye, huge and unblinking, reflecting the tiny figure of the traveler.
Medium shot: The traveler frozen in place, arms up, breathing shallow, face-to-face with a creature that shouldn't exist.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: The teenager's screen showing a direct message notification from a stranger. The username is intimidating.
Medium shot: The teenager pulls back from the screen slightly, realizing the internet is not just content but real people watching.
Over-the-shoulder: A comment section full of aggressive replies to the teenager's first innocent post, reality biting back.
lines.core_pt: Quando o entretenimento se torna real.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O momento em que a realidade olha de volta: Quando o que você achava que era entretenimento se torna perigosamente real. O dinossauro não se importa com seu itinerário.
lines.core_pt_pt: Quando o entretenimento se torna real.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O momento em que a realidade te olha de frente: Quando o que pensavas ser entretenimento se torna perigosamente real. O dinossauro não se importa com o teu itinerário.

lines.lyric: I landed in a valley of moss and smoke
lines.real_meaning: The sensory shock of a new world: Every immigrant, every explorer, every refugee knows this moment, the smell, the air, the terrifying beauty of somewhere completely alien.
media_queries: Wide establishing shot: A vast prehistoric valley at dusk, thick green moss covering every surface, tendrils of smoke rising from distant volcanic vents.
Medium shot: The traveler stumbles out of the phone booth into ankle-deep moss, coughing from the sulfurous smoke in the heavy air.
Aerial shot: The green phone booth tiny in the center of the enormous valley, surrounded by primordial forest and smoking hills.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The teenager's first social media feed loading, a waterfall of images, videos, text, likes, colors flooding the screen.
Medium shot: The teenager's eyes go wide, scrolling faster and faster through content that never ends, mouth slightly open.
Close-up: The screen reflection in the teenager's glasses, showing hundreds of tiny thumbnails cascading downward infinitely.
lines.core_pt: O choque de um lugar alienígena.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O choque sensorial de um novo mundo: Todo imigrante, todo explorador, todo refugiado conhece esse momento, o cheiro, o ar, a beleza aterrorizante de um lugar completamente alienígena.
lines.core_pt_pt: O choque de um lugar alienígena.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O choque dos sentidos de um novo mundo: Cada imigrante, cada explorador, cada refugiado conhece este momento, o cheiro, o ar, a aterrorizante beleza de um lugar completamente alheio.

lines.lyric: Smell of rain, the night awoke
lines.real_meaning: The primal immersion: Before language, before meaning, there is sensation. Rain on skin, smoke in lungs, darkness pressing in. This is the world before the filter.
media_queries: Close-up: Heavy raindrops splashing on broad prehistoric fern leaves, each drop lit by distant volcanic glow.
Wide shot: The valley transitioning from dusk to night, the sky deepening to indigo, stars appearing between clouds of volcanic ash.
Medium shot: The traveler pulling their hoodie tight, looking up at the alien sky, rain streaking down their face.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: The teenager's phone buzzes on the nightstand. A notification. Then another. Then a cascade of vibrations.
Medium shot: The dark bedroom lit only by the phone's screen, shadows dancing on the walls with each new notification.
Wide shot: Outside the bedroom window, the real world with streetlights, rain, a quiet neighborhood, completely ignored.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A imersão primordial: Antes da linguagem, antes do significado, há a sensação. Chuva na pele, fumaça nos pulmões, escuridão pressionando. Este é o mundo antes do filtro.
lines.core_pt_pt: O mundo antes do filtro.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A imersão primordial: Antes da linguagem, antes do significado, há a sensação. Chuva na pele, fumo nos pulmões, escuridão a pressionar. Este é o mundo antes do filtro.

lines.lyric: And there he was, the first human soul
lines.real_meaning: The encounter with raw humanity: Before branding, before resumes, before followers, a human being, desperate, real, unfiltered. We have forgotten what that looks like.
media_queries: Wide shot: Near a rocky cave mouth, a small dying fire barely illuminates a lone figure crouched on the ground, surrounded by darkness.
Medium shot: The cave dweller Gralha, filthy and exhausted, his face gaunt, ribs visible, desperately hunched over smoking stones.
Close-up: Gralha's trembling hands cupping a tiny ember on a dried leaf, blowing gently, his breath visible in the cold air.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: A grainy webcam video playing on the teenager's screen, someone in a messy room talking earnestly to the camera.
Close-up: The webcam creator's face, genuine and unpolished, no ring light, no editing, just raw honesty.
Over-the-shoulder: The teenager watches intently, leaning closer to the screen, captivated by something real in the noise.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O encontro com a humanidade crua: Antes do branding, antes dos currículos, antes dos seguidores, um ser humano, desesperado, real, sem filtros. Esquecemos como é isso.
lines.core_pt_pt: Humanidade crua. Sem seguidores.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O encontro com a humanidade crua: Antes do branding, antes dos currículos, antes dos seguidores, um ser humano, desesperado, real, sem filtros. Esquecemo-nos de como é isso.

lines.lyric: Blowing on a twig, losing control
lines.real_meaning: The desperation of the powerless: Before the lighter, fire was a daily battle. Imagine fighting for warmth every single night. That is life without tools, and without critical thought.
media_queries: Close-up: Gralha's cracked lips blowing desperately on a tiny smoking twig, sweat and soot on his forehead, eyes panicked.
Medium shot: The twig's ember glows red, flickers, then dies completely. Gralha's shoulders slump in defeat.
Wide shot: Gralha alone by the dead fire pit in near-total darkness, the cold forest pressing in around him.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A frustrated user's hand clicking 'forgot password' for the third time, screen showing 'invalid credentials'.
Medium shot: The webcam creator on screen trying to fix a technical glitch, fumbling with cables, apologizing to viewers.
Over-the-shoulder: The teenager smirks at the screen, a thought forming, they know how to fix that problem.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O desespero dos impotentes: Antes do isqueiro, o fogo era uma batalha diária. Imagine lutar pelo calor todas as noites. Essa é a vida sem ferramentas e sem pensamento crítico.
lines.core_pt_pt: Vida sem ferramentas ou pensamento.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A desesperação dos desamparados: Antes do isqueiro, o fogo era uma batalha diária. Imagina lutar pelo calor todas as noites. É assim a vida sem ferramentas, e sem pensamento crítico.

lines.lyric: I'm the Mage by accident
lines.real_meaning: The accidental authority: Every guru, every CEO, every influencer, most of them didn't plan it. They just had a lighter when everyone else had twigs.
media_queries: Medium shot: The traveler standing at the edge of the firelight, the orange BIC lighter in hand, realizing the weight of what is about to happen.
Close-up: The traveler's thumb on the lighter's spark wheel, hesitating, the metal catching the last glint of dying embers.
Wide shot: Gralha on his knees looking up at the traveler, who stands backlit by faint moonlight, an accidental silhouette of power.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: The teenager posts a casual reply to the webcam creator's problem, a simple fix, three lines of text.
Close-up: A notification pops up: 'Your comment received 47 likes.' The teenager stares, surprised.
Over-the-shoulder: More notifications flooding in. People replying 'genius', 'how did you know that', 'follow this person'.
lines.core: A lighter when others had twigs.
lines.core_pt: Um isqueiro quando os outros tinham gravetos.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A autoridade acidental: Todo guru, todo CEO, todo influenciador, a maioria deles não planejou. Eles simplesmente tinham um isqueiro quando todos os outros tinham gravetos.
lines.core_pt_pt: Um isqueiro quando os outros tinham gravetos.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A autoridade acidental: Cada guru, cada CEO, cada influenciador, a maioria deles não planeou. Eles simplesmente tinham um isqueiro quando todos os outros tinham gravetos.

lines.lyric: Right guy, wrong time, no consent
lines.real_meaning: The unwilling prophet: Nobody asks to be deified. The lighter didn't come with instructions for godhood. Neither did your smartphone.
media_queries: Close-up: The traveler's conflicted face, eyes darting between Gralha's desperate gaze and the lighter, knowing this will change everything.
Medium shot: The traveler looking back toward the green phone booth in the distance, considering escape, but Gralha already reaching out.
Wide shot: The prehistoric valley at night, the traveler small between the cave and the phone booth, caught between two worlds.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: The teenager's follower count jumping from 3 to 300 overnight, the phone buzzing relentlessly on the nightstand.
Close-up: The teenager's alarm clock reads 6:30 AM for school, but the phone screen shows 43 unread messages.
Wide shot: The teenager sitting on the bed edge, phone in hand, looking overwhelmed, this was not the plan.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O profeta relutante: Ninguém pede para ser deificado. O isqueiro não veio com instruções para a divindade. Nem o seu smartphone.
lines.core_pt_pt: Ninguém pede para ser deificado.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O profeta relutante: Ninguém pede para ser deificado. O isqueiro não veio com instruções para a divindade. Nem o teu telemóvel.

lines.lyric: Came for some rocks, now I gotta run
lines.real_meaning: The point of no return: You came to browse, to scroll, to kill time. Now you are trapped in a narrative you didn't write. Welcome to the algorithm.
media_queries: Medium shot: The traveler glancing nervously at the geology hammer still in their backpack, the original innocent mission now irrelevant.
Wide shot: Shadows moving in the forest behind the cave, more creatures watching from the treeline.
Close-up: The traveler's boots shifting in the moss, body language caught between fight and flight, the lighter still clutched tight.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: The teenager tries to close the laptop but a new DM pops up: 'Can you help me too?' Then another. Then five more.
Close-up: The teenager's original browser tab, a simple homework search, buried under thirty other tabs.
Over-the-shoulder: A trending notification appears, the teenager's comment is being shared across platforms they have never heard of.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O ponto sem retorno: Você veio para navegar, para rolar, para matar o tempo. Agora você está preso em uma narrativa que você não escreveu. Bem-vindo ao algoritmo.
lines.core_pt_pt: Bem-vindo ao algoritmo.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O ponto sem retorno: Vieste a navegar, a descer, a matar o tempo. Agora estás preso numa narrativa que não escreveste. Bem-vindo ao algoritmo.

lines.lyric: But the story's already begun
lines.real_meaning: Irreversibility: Once you light the fire, you can't unlight it. Once you post, you can't unpost. Once they have seen magic, you are the magician forever.
media_queries: Wide shot: Gralha on his feet now, moving toward the traveler with urgent primal determination, arms outstretched.
Medium shot: The cave's dead fire pit, cold black stones waiting, as if the universe itself is holding its breath.
Close-up: The traveler's eyes accepting fate, a deep breath, jaw set, fingers tightening on the lighter.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The teenager's post screenshot appearing on a popular meme page with thousands of views already.
Medium shot: The teenager's real name and school showing up in a reply thread. Privacy evaporating in real time.
Close-up: The 'Delete Post' button on screen, but below it: '2,847 shares'. Too late.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Irreversibilidade: Uma vez que você acende o fogo, você não pode apagá-lo. Uma vez que você posta, você não pode despostar. Uma vez que eles viram magia, você é o mágico para sempre.
lines.core_pt_pt: Uma vez publicado, nunca despublicado.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Irreversibilidade: Assim que acendes o fogo, não o podes apagar. Assim que publicas, não podes despublicar. Assim que viram magia, és o mago para sempre.

lines.lyric: Chak-chak, the flame lit bright
lines.real_meaning: The moment of ignition: Two syllables. One spark. Everything changes. This is the iPhone launch. The first Google search. The moment Prometheus stole fire.
media_queries: Extreme close-up: The lighter's spark wheel spinning, sparks flying in slow motion, igniting the butane with a bright orange flame.
Medium shot: The flame erupts from the lighter, illuminating the entire cave entrance in warm golden light, shadows leaping on the walls.
Wide shot: The flame's glow spreading across the valley floor, Gralha stumbling backward, the traveler holding fire like a torch.
hidden_media_queries: Extreme close-up: A finger tapping 'POST' on a glowing touchscreen, the button turning from blue to green.
Medium shot: The teenager's screen exploding with hearts, likes, retweets, the numbers spinning upward like a slot machine.
Wide shot: The dark bedroom now fully illuminated by the screen's frantic activity, the teenager's shadow large on the wall.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O momento da ignição: Duas sílabas. Uma faísca. Tudo muda. Este é o lançamento do iPhone. A primeira pesquisa do Google. O momento em que Prometeu roubou o fogo.
lines.core_pt_pt: Duas sílabas. Tudo muda.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O momento da ignição: Duas sílabas. Uma faísca. Tudo muda. É o lançamento do iPhone. A primeira pesquisa no Google. O momento em que Prometeu roubou o fogo.

lines.lyric: And my whole life faded into night
lines.real_meaning: The sacrifice: To become the Mage, you surrender your old self. To become an influencer, you surrender your privacy. To become a leader, you surrender your freedom.
media_queries: Wide shot: The green phone booth in the far distance, barely visible, as the traveler turns away from it toward the cave and the firelight.
Medium shot: The traveler's hoodie now illuminated by the fire, their face half in light and half in shadow, the old life dissolving.
Close-up: The traveler's modern watch face going dark, as if time itself has stopped, the digital display flickering and dying.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The teenager's bedroom transforming, posters fading, toys disappearing, replaced by ring lights and a microphone setup.
Medium shot: The teenager staring at their reflection in the dark phone screen, barely recognizing themselves.
Close-up: A photo from yesterday, smiling with friends at school, now feels like it belongs to another lifetime.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O sacrifício: Para se tornar o Mago, você renuncia ao seu antigo eu. Para se tornar um influenciador, você renuncia à sua privacidade. Para se tornar um líder, você renuncia à sua liberdade.
lines.core_pt_pt: O líder abdica da liberdade.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O sacrifício: Para te tornares o Mago, sacrificas a tua antiga personalidade. Para te tornares um influencer, sacrificas a tua privacidade. Para te tornares um líder, sacrificas a tua liberdade.

lines.lyric: Gralha looked at me, dropped his stick
lines.real_meaning: The first conversion: The moment the believer discards their own tools. Why use a stick when someone has a lighter? Why think when someone has the answers?
media_queries: Medium shot: Gralha staring at the traveler with enormous eyes, his crude fire-starting stick slipping from his fingers and clattering to the ground.
Close-up: The fallen stick on the cave floor, a primitive tool now obsolete, discarded without a second thought.
Over-the-shoulder from traveler: Gralha stepping forward, abandoning his old fire pit entirely, reaching toward the magic flame.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: A person closing their physical notebook and pushing it aside, opening a tablet instead, transferring all trust to the screen.
Close-up: A handwritten journal collecting dust beside a glowing smartphone, the old way of thinking abandoned.
Wide shot: A classroom where every student has a laptop open, the teacher's chalkboard empty and ignored behind them.
lines.core: Why think when someone has answers?
lines.core_pt: Por que pensar quando alguém tem respostas?
lines.real_meaning_pt: A primeira conversão: O momento em que o crente descarta suas próprias ferramentas. Por que usar um graveto quando alguém tem um isqueiro? Por que pensar quando alguém tem as respostas?
lines.core_pt_pt: Por que pensar quando alguém tem respostas?
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A primeira conversão: O momento em que o crente se despoja das suas próprias ferramentas. Para que usar uma vara quando alguém tem um isqueiro? Para que pensar quando alguém tem as respostas?

lines.lyric: Saw my Super Bock sweater, thick
lines.real_meaning: Branding as divinity: Gralha doesn't understand the sweater, he worships the logo. We don't understand the iPhone, we worship the Apple. The symbol replaces the substance.
media_queries: Close-up: The traveler's chest showing a thick knitted sweater with a large Super Bock beer logo, alien and incomprehensible to Gralha.
Medium shot: Gralha reaching out cautiously to touch the sweater's fabric, feeling the soft wool, his expression shifting from awe to reverence.
Close-up: Gralha's dirty fingers tracing the embroidered letters of the logo, treating each stitch like a sacred glyph.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A teenager's eyes locked on an influencer's branded merchandise, a hoodie with a bold logo, perfectly lit in a product photo.
Medium shot: A shopping cart on screen filling up with branded items, the hoodie, the cap, the water bottle, all bearing the same logo.
Over-the-shoulder: The teenager wearing the newly arrived merch, posing in the mirror, becoming a walking advertisement.
lines.core: We worship the logo, not the thing.
lines.core_pt: Nós adoramos o logotipo, não a coisa.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Marca como divindade: Gralha não entende o suéter, ele adora o logo. Não entendemos o iPhone, adoramos a Apple. O símbolo substitui a substância.
lines.core_pt_pt: Nós adoramos o logótipo, não a coisa.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Branding como divindade: a Gralha não percebe o suéter, adora o logótipo. Não percebemos o iPhone, adoramos a Apple. O símbolo substitui a substância.

lines.lyric: Pointed at the lighter, went "Uga boo"
lines.real_meaning: The demand for magic: 'Show me the trick again.' The consumer doesn't want to understand, they want to be amazed. Repeat the miracle. Make fire. Again.
media_queries: Medium shot: Gralha pointing urgently at the orange BIC lighter in the traveler's hand, grunting excitedly, bouncing on his heels.
Close-up: Gralha's mouth forming primal sounds, his face contorted with desperate curiosity, finger jabbing toward the lighter.
Over-the-shoulder from Gralha: The lighter gleaming in the traveler's palm, the most powerful object in this world.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: A crowd at a tech keynote, phones raised, all recording, chanting the CEO's name before the product reveal.
Close-up: Hundreds of identical phone screens in a dark auditorium, all showing the same live stream, waiting for the big moment.
Wide shot: The keynote stage with a single spotlight on a glass pedestal, the audience leaning forward as the cloth is about to be pulled.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A demanda por magia: 'Mostre o truque novamente.' O consumidor não quer entender, ele quer se maravilhar. Repita o milagre. Faça fogo. De novo.
lines.core_pt_pt: Mostra-me o truque outra vez.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A procura de magia: 'Mostra-me o truque outra vez.' O consumidor não quer compreender, quer ficar espantado. Repete o milagre. Faz fogo. Outra vez.

lines.lyric: I went chak-chak, he fell back, knew
lines.real_meaning: The product demo: Two clicks. That is all it takes. The crowd falls silent. The sale is made. The conversion is complete. Nobody asks how it works.
media_queries: Extreme close-up: The traveler's thumb flicking the lighter wheel, chak-chak, sparks flying, flame erupting bright orange.
Medium shot: Gralha falling backward onto the ground in shock, arms splayed, mouth wide open, eyes reflecting the impossible flame.
Wide shot: The cave entrance illuminated by the steady lighter flame, Gralha sprawled on the ground, the traveler standing over him.
hidden_media_queries: Extreme close-up: A finger swiping on a phone screen, unlocking it with a single fluid gesture, the home screen blooming open.
Medium shot: The keynote audience gasping collectively, some standing up, phones recording the new product demo.
Wide shot: The product demo on a massive stage screen, the audience bathed in the glow, hands raised, worshipping the demonstration.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A demonstração do produto: dois cliques. É só isso. A multidão fica em silêncio. A venda é fechada. A conversão é completa. Ninguém pergunta como funciona.
lines.core_pt_pt: Dois cliques. Venda feita.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A demonstração do produto: dois cliques. É só isso. A multidão fica em silêncio. A venda é feita. A conversão está completa. Ninguém pergunta como é que funciona.

lines.lyric: UUUUGA BOOGAH! TCHAN TCHAN!
lines.real_meaning: The primal viral moment: Before language had nuance, the scream was the share button. 'UUUGA BOOGAH' is the first retweet, the first 'OMG YOU HAVE TO SEE THIS'.
media_queries: Wide shot: Gralha scrambling to his feet, turning toward the dark forest, cupping his hands around his mouth, screaming into the night.
Medium shot: Gralha's face contorted in a massive primal scream, veins in his neck bulging, sound waves visible in the smoky air.
Wide shot: The scream echoing across the valley, birds scattering from treetops, distant shadows stirring in the darkness.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A thumb frantically tapping the share button on a phone screen, the same post being sent to ten different group chats.
Medium shot: A teenager shouting across a school hallway holding their phone up, others running over to look.
Wide shot: A notification avalanche on a computer screen, shares multiplying exponentially, the counter climbing from hundreds to thousands.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O momento viral primordial: Antes que a linguagem tivesse nuances, o grito era o botão de compartilhar. 'UUUGA BOOGAH' é o primeiro retweet, o primeiro 'NÃO ACREDITO, VOCÊ TEM QUE VER ISSO'.
lines.core_pt_pt: O primeiro retweet.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O momento viral primordial: Antes de a linguagem ter nuance, o grito era o botão de partilhar. 'UUUGA BOOGAH' é o primeiro retweet, o primeiro 'OMG tens de ver isto'.

lines.lyric: Translation: "Come see the madman!"
lines.real_meaning: The framing of genius as madness: Every innovator is first called crazy. Every prophet is first called a madman. The translation is always wrong, but it doesn't matter, they come anyway.
media_queries: Medium shot: Gralha beckoning wildly toward the cave, gesturing for unseen others to come, his movements frantic and evangelical.
Close-up: Gralha's hand pointing back at the traveler with the lighter, his expression a mix of terror and worship.
Wide shot: Movement in the treeline, shapes emerging from the darkness, drawn by the screaming, curious shadows approaching.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A clickbait headline on a news site: 'THIS KID'S HACK IS BREAKING THE INTERNET', sensationalized and misleading.
Medium shot: The teenager's post being featured on a trending page, surrounded by flashy graphics and exaggerated captions.
Over-the-shoulder: The teenager reading comments: 'this kid is insane', 'absolute madman', 'genius or crazy', fame arriving uninvited.
lines.core: Every genius is first called crazy.
lines.core_pt: Todo gênio é primeiro chamado de louco.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O enquadramento do gênio como loucura: Todo inovador é primeiro chamado de louco. Todo profeta é primeiro chamado de louco. A tradução está sempre errada, mas não importa, eles vêm de qualquer maneira.
lines.core_pt_pt: Todo o génio é primeiro chamado de doido.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O enquadramento do génio como loucura: Todo o inovador é primeiro chamado de louco. Todo o profeta é primeiro chamado de doido. A tradução está sempre errada, mas não interessa, eles vêm de qualquer maneira.

lines.lyric: Five minutes, twelve creatures gathered round
lines.real_meaning: The speed of worship: Five minutes. That is how fast a religion forms. That is how fast a product goes viral. That is how fast a mob assembles.
media_queries: Wide shot: Twelve cave dwellers of various ages emerging from the forest, approaching the cave entrance cautiously, eyes reflecting firelight.
Medium shot: The group forming a rough semicircle around the traveler, some crouching, some standing, all staring at the lighter flame.
Close-up: Multiple pairs of wide, unblinking prehistoric eyes in the darkness, each reflecting the tiny orange flame.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A live stream viewer count climbing rapidly, 12, 120, 1200, each number a face glued to a screen.
Medium shot: A grid of video call faces all staring at the same shared screen, mouths slightly open, completely silent.
Close-up: A follower counter spinning upward on a social media profile, each tick representing a person surrendering their attention.
lines.core: Five minutes to form a religion.
lines.core_pt: Cinco minutos para formar uma religião.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A velocidade da adoração: cinco minutos. É assim de rápido que uma religião se forma. É assim de rápido que um produto viraliza. É assim de rápido que uma multidão se reúne.
lines.core_pt_pt: Cinco minutos para formar uma religião.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A velocidade da adoração: cinco minutos. É assim de rápido que se forma uma religião. É assim de rápido que um produto se torna viral. É assim de rápido que um grupo se forma.

lines.lyric: Mouths wide open, not a sound
lines.real_meaning: The silence of surrender: When the audience stops talking and starts consuming. The scroll. The binge. The sermon. Mouths open, brains off, credit cards ready.
media_queries: Close-up: A young cave dweller child, face smeared with dirt, mouth hanging open in pure wonder, eyes locked on the flame.
Medium shot: The entire group frozen in absolute silence, the only sound the crackling of the lighter's flame in the still night air.
Wide shot: The circle of mesmerized cave dwellers, the traveler at the center holding the lighter aloft, an accidental altar forming.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A person's face bathed in blue light, jaw slack, scrolling endlessly, pupils dilated, completely hypnotized.
Medium shot: A subway car full of commuters, every single one looking down at their phone, mouths slightly open, zero conversation.
Wide shot: A conference audience in complete silence, all filming the same thing on their phones, hundreds of identical rectangles of light.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O silêncio da rendição: Quando o público para de falar e começa a consumir. O rolar. A maratona. O sermão. Bocas abertas, cérebros desligados, cartões de crédito prontos.
lines.core_pt_pt: Bocas abertas, cérebros desligados.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O silêncio da rendição: Quando o público deixa de falar e começa a consumir. O desfile. O consumo excessivo. O sermão. Bocas abertas, cérebros desligados, cartões de crédito prontos.

lines.lyric: I'm the Mage by accident
lines.real_meaning: The trap deepens: You said it once and it was honest. Now you say it again and it is becoming your identity. The accident is becoming your destiny. The mask is fusing to your face.
media_queries: Medium shot: The traveler now seated on a flat stone like a throne, the cave dwellers arranged around them, the lighter still burning.
Close-up: The traveler's face, the initial shock replaced by weary resignation, the flame reflecting in their tired eyes.
Wide shot: The cave now warm and bright from the lighter's glow, the green phone booth invisible in the far distance darkness.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: The teenager at a desk with a proper ring light and camera setup, filming content instead of doing homework.
Close-up: The teenager's face in the ring light glow, the candid expressions replaced by a practiced camera smile.
Over-the-shoulder: A dashboard showing analytics, subscribers, watch time, the teenager now managing metrics instead of living life.
lines.core: The mask fuses to your face.
lines.core_pt: A máscara funde ao seu rosto.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A armadilha se aprofunda: Você disse uma vez e foi honesto. Agora você diz novamente e está se tornando sua identidade. O acidente está se tornando seu destino. A máscara está se fundindo ao seu rosto.
lines.core_pt_pt: A máscara funde-se ao teu rosto.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A armadilha aprofunda-se: Disseste-o uma vez e foi honesto. Agora repetes-o e está a tornar-se a tua identidade. O acidente está a tornar-se o teu destino. A máscara está a fundir-se à tua cara.

lines.lyric: Right guy, wrong time, no consent
lines.real_meaning: The second chorus reality: This is not cute anymore. The lack of consent is real now. They need you. They demand you. The platform will not let you leave.
media_queries: Medium shot: Cave dwellers blocking the path back to the phone booth, not maliciously but needfully, their hands reaching toward the traveler.
Close-up: The traveler looking over their shoulder toward the phone booth, now completely swallowed by the dark prehistoric forest.
Wide shot: The cave has become a camp, makeshift shelters forming around the traveler's stone seat, a settlement building overnight.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: The teenager trying to log out but a popup appears: 'Your followers will miss you! Are you sure?'
Close-up: The 'Deactivate Account' page with partnership offers, brand deals, a verified badge waiting for approval below it.
Wide shot: The teenager's room now a full studio with lights, backdrop, microphone, the bedroom gone, replaced by a production set.
lines.core: The platform won't let you leave.
lines.core_pt: A plataforma não deixa você sair.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A segunda realidade do coro: Isso não é mais fofo. A falta de consentimento é real agora. Eles precisam de você. Eles exigem você. A plataforma não vai deixar você sair.
lines.core_pt_pt: A plataforma não te deixa sair.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A segunda realidade do coro: Isto já não é giro. A falta de consentimento é real agora. Eles precisam de ti. Eles exigem-te. A plataforma não te vai deixar sair.

lines.lyric: Came for some rocks, now I gotta run
lines.real_meaning: The obligation trap: The rocks are forgotten. The original purpose is dead. Now you serve the machine that you accidentally built. The creator becomes the servant.
media_queries: Close-up: The geology hammer buried under a pile of animal skins and crude offerings placed at the traveler's feet.
Medium shot: The traveler standing, looking for an exit route, but cave dwellers surround every direction with expectant faces.
Wide shot: The growing settlement at dawn, crude structures and fire pits being built, all centered around the traveler's stone seat.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: The teenager's original homework file, untouched for weeks, buried under folders named 'content_march' and 'thumbnails'.
Medium shot: The teenager on a video call with a talent manager explaining a content schedule, the teenager looking overwhelmed.
Wide shot: A calendar on screen, every day blocked with 'POST', 'STREAM', 'COLLAB', 'EDIT', no free time visible anywhere.
lines.core_pt: O criador se torna o servo.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A armadilha da obrigação: As rochas são esquecidas. O propósito original está morto. Agora você serve a máquina que acidentalmente construiu. O criador se torna o servo.
lines.core_pt_pt: O criador torna-se o servo.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A armadilha da obrigação: As pedras são esquecidas. O propósito original está morto. Agora serves a máquina que acidentalmente construíste. O criador torna-se o servo.

lines.lyric: But the story's already begun
lines.real_meaning: Escalated inevitability: The story has momentum now. Others are writing it for you. The comments, the expectations, the followers, they own the narrative.
media_queries: Wide shot: Cave dwellers drawing crude images on the cave wall, a figure holding fire, surrounded by a circle of worshippers.
Close-up: A cave painting being drawn with ochre, the traveler depicted as a giant, the lighter depicted as a sun in their hand.
Medium shot: Young cave dwellers reenacting the chak-chak moment, one pretending to be the Mage, others falling back in practiced awe.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: Fan accounts appearing online, using the teenager's photos, creating memes, writing fan fiction about them.
Close-up: A Wikipedia article being created with the teenager's name and origin story, a biographical narrative they didn't write.
Medium shot: The teenager scrolling through their own tag on social media, seeing strangers define who they are, powerless to correct it.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Escalada inevitável: A história agora tem impulso. Outros estão escrevendo para você. Os comentários, as expectativas, os seguidores, eles possuem a narrativa.
lines.core_pt_pt: Outros já têm o controlo da tua narrativa.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Inevitabilidade escalada: A história já tem o seu próprio impulso. Outros estão a escrevê-la por ti. Os comentários, as expectativas, os seguidores, eles é que têm o controle da narrativa.

lines.lyric: Chak-chak, the flame lit bright
lines.real_meaning: The ritual solidifies: What was spontaneous is now expected. The chak-chak is no longer a surprise, it is a performance. The lighter is a liturgy.
media_queries: Extreme close-up: The lighter wheel spinning again, but now surrounded by dozens of watching eyes, the performance ritualized.
Wide shot: The traveler performing the chak-chak for the gathered tribe, the flame erupting as the crowd sways in unison.
Medium shot: The cave dwellers bowing as the flame appears, hands raised, a ceremony forming around a piece of disposable plastic.
hidden_media_queries: Extreme close-up: The teenager's finger hovering over 'GO LIVE', about to perform again, the spontaneity replaced by obligation.
Wide shot: A live stream in progress, the teenager performing on camera, chat scrolling with demands for the signature move.
Medium shot: The teenager finishing the stream, slumping back in the chair exhausted, the ring light still blazing.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O ritual se solidifica: o que era espontâneo agora é esperado. O chak-chak não é mais uma surpresa, é uma apresentação. O isqueiro é uma liturgia.
lines.core_pt_pt: A espontaneidade torna-se obrigação.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O ritual solidifica-se: O que era espontâneo passa a ser esperado. O chak-chak já não é uma surpresa, é uma performance. O isqueiro é uma liturgia.

lines.lyric: And my whole life faded into night
lines.real_meaning: The final surrender: Your old identity is gone. You are The Mage now. You are the brand. The person behind the profile pic has ceased to exist.
media_queries: Wide shot: The traveler sitting alone on the stone throne at night, the tribe asleep around them, staring at the stars, profoundly alone.
Close-up: The traveler's face in the dying firelight, eyes hollow, the weight of accidental godhood pressing down visibly.
Medium shot: The green phone booth now barely a speck of faded green paint in the far distance, overgrown with prehistoric vines.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The teenager lying in bed in the fully equipped studio-bedroom, staring at the ceiling, phone face-down for the first time.
Close-up: The teenager's real face, no filter, no ring light, dark circles under the eyes, a person behind the persona.
Medium shot: An old framed photo on the desk showing the teenager laughing with friends outdoors, a ghost from before the screen.
lines.core: The person behind the profile is gone.
lines.core_pt: A pessoa por trás do perfil se foi.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A rendição final: Sua antiga identidade se foi. Você é O Mago agora. Você é a marca. A pessoa por trás da foto do perfil deixou de existir.
lines.core_pt_pt: A pessoa por trás do perfil desapareceu.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A rendição final: A tua antiga identidade desapareceu. Tu és O Mago agora. Tu és a marca. A pessoa por trás da foto de perfil deixou de existir.

lines.lyric: Where the hell did I land?
lines.real_meaning: The devastating question: It is not about geography. It is about identity. Where am I? What have I become? Is this my life now? The question every human asks when they realize they have been sleepwalking into someone else's story.
media_queries: Wide shot: The traveler standing at the edge of a cliff at dawn, overlooking the vast prehistoric valley now dotted with fires and shelters.
Medium shot: The traveler looking down at the lighter in their hand, then out at the world they have accidentally reshaped, bewildered.
Close-up: The traveler's eyes, equal parts wonder and terror, reflecting the enormous untamed world stretching to the horizon.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The teenager standing in the middle of their studio-bedroom, surrounded by equipment, merch boxes, and screens, looking lost.
Medium shot: The teenager holding their phone at arm's length, looking at their own profile, a stranger's face smiling back.
Close-up: The teenager's eyes reflecting the phone screen, a single tear catching the glow, the devastating question on their face.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A devastadora pergunta: Não se trata de geografia. Trata-se de identidade. Onde estou? O que me tornei? É esta a minha vida agora? A pergunta que todo ser humano faz quando percebe que tem andado sonâmbulo na história de outra pessoa.
lines.core_pt_pt: O que é que eu me tornei?
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A devastadora questão: Não é sobre geografia. É sobre identidade. Onde estou? O que me tornei? É esta a minha vida agora? A pergunta que todo o ser humano faz quando se apercebe de que tem andado a dormir e a sonhar a vida de outra pessoa.

lines.lyric: Gralha held the orange box, turned it in his hand
lines.real_meaning: The birth of the artifact: The mundane BIC lighter becomes the first sacred object. We revere the sleek plastic shell instead of understanding the mechanism.
media_queries: Medium shot: The traveler extends their hand, offering the smooth, transparent orange BIC lighter. Gralha reaches out with trembling, soot-stained fingers.
Close-up: Gralha's filthy hands awkwardly grasp the pristine plastic lighter. He holds it up to the faint moonlight.
Extreme close-up: The metal wheel and flint of the lighter, an alien mechanical perfection against the rugged, dirty skin of the caveman.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A time jump. A sleek, modern minimalist bedroom. A young adult (Gralha modern) sits on the edge of the bed staring at an unopened smartphone box.
Medium shot: The young adult slowly, reverently lifts the lid off the perfectly designed white box.
Close-up: The pristine, black glass of the new flagship smartphone resting perfectly in its molded cradle.
lines.core: Revere the shell, ignore the mechanism.
lines.core_pt: Revere a concha, ignore o mecanismo.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O nascimento do artefato: o isqueiro BIC comum se torna o primeiro objeto sagrado. Reverenciamos a carcaça de plástico elegante em vez de entender o mecanismo.
lines.core_pt_pt: Respeita a concha, ignora o mecanismo.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O nascimento do artefacto: O vulgar isqueiro BIC torna-se o primeiro objecto sagrado. Reverenciamos a elegante concha de plástico em vez de compreender o mecanismo.

lines.lyric: "Mage," he said, "explain to me, help me understand
lines.real_meaning: The surrender of critical thought: The consumer begs the 'expert' for meaning, voluntarily giving up their own intellect to the monopoly of the Clergy/Elite.
media_queries: Medium shot: Gralha looks from the lighter to the traveler, his posture submissive, eyes wide with desperate questions.
Close-up: Gralha's mouth moves in urgent, silent grunts, gesturing frantically between the dying fire pit and the orange plastic.
Over-the-shoulder (traveler): Looking down at Gralha, who is now kneeling, holding the lighter up like a sacred offering, begging for the secret.
hidden_media_queries: Medium tracking shot: The young adult powers on the phone. The screen illuminates, demanding setup. They look frustrated, tapping eagerly.
Over-the-shoulder shot: The phone screen shows a setup error. The user immediately opens their laptop to search for a solution.
Close-up: A YouTube video loading on the laptop—a charismatic tech influencer promising to 'fix everything and optimize your life'.
lines.core: Surrender your intellect to the expert.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A rendição do pensamento crítico: o consumidor suplica ao 'experto' por significado, voluntariamente abdicando de seu próprio intelecto ao monopólio do Clero/Elite.
lines.core_pt_pt: Entrega a tua inteligência ao especialista.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A rendição do pensamento crítico: o consumidor suplica ao 'perito' um sentido, entregando voluntariamente o seu próprio intelecto ao monopólio do Clero/Elite.

lines.lyric: Where does fire sleep at night? Where does it go to rest?
lines.real_meaning: The mysticism of the unknown: When faced with ignorance, the human mind invents magical explanations for mechanical realities.
media_queries: Wide shot: The traveler stands tall over the kneeling caveman. Other members of the tribe begin to slowly emerge from the cave, drawn by the commotion.
Medium shot: The tribe watches in awe from the shadows as the traveler points cryptically at the small plastic casing of the lighter.
Close-up: The translucent orange plastic casing of the BIC lighter, catching a glint of moonlight, holding the mysterious 'sleeping' fire.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: The young adult watches the influencer intently, taking notes, hanging on every word about the new device's secret features.
Close-up: The influencer's face on the screen, energetic, artificially lit, exuding absolute confidence and authority.
Extreme close-up: The young adult's eyes, wide, completely absorbed, accepting the influencer's word as gospel.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O misticismo do desconhecido: Quando confrontado com a ignorância, a mente humana inventa explicações mágicas para realidades mecânicas.
lines.core_pt_pt: Explicações mágicas para verdades mecânicas.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O mistério do desconhecido: Quando confrontado com a ignorância, o espírito humano inventa explicações mágicas para realidades mecânicas.

lines.lyric: Show me its cradle, show me its nest."
lines.real_meaning: The desire for physical proof of the magical narrative. We want a temple for our tools, a cradle for our false gods.
media_queries: Medium tracking shot: The other cave dwellers creep closer, forming a tight circle around the traveler and Gralha, their eyes fixed solely on the orange box.
Close-up: A female cave dweller (Muda) watches silently from the back of the crowd, her eyes analytical rather than worshipful.
Close-up: The traveler's thumb confidently rests on the metal wheel of the lighter, preparing to strike.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A massive, darkened auditorium. Thousands of people sit in silence, their faces lit by the glow of a colossal stage screen.
Medium shot: A charismatic CEO paces the stage in a black turtleneck, holding up the newest, thinnest smartphone.
Close-up: The CEO's hand holding the device towards the audience, as if presenting a religious artifact.
lines.core: A temple for our false gods.
lines.core_pt: Um templo para nossos deuses falsos.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O desejo de prova física da narrativa mágica. Queremos um templo para nossas ferramentas, um berço para nossos deuses falsos.
lines.core_pt_pt: Um templo para os nossos deuses falsos.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O desejo de prova física da narrativa mágica. Queremos um templo para as nossas ferramentas, um berço para os nossos deuses falsos.

lines.lyric: THE ORANGE BOX! THE ORANGE BOX!
lines.real_meaning: The first religious chant: Branding is born. The aesthetic of the object (the Orange Box) becomes the focus of worship, eclipsing its actual utility.
media_queries: Wide shot: The traveler strikes the wheel. Chak-chak. A perfect, steady, tear-shaped flame abruptly illuminating the dark clearing.
Medium shot: The sudden burst of light. The entire tribe gasps together, recoiling slightly, then leaning in, completely mesmerized.
Close-up: The perfect, unnatural stillness of the butane flame, wildly contrasting with the chaotic, messy world of the cave.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The audience erupts into thunderous applause, a wave of standing ovations rolling through the auditorium.
Medium shot: People in the crowd are crying, cheering, holding their hands to their faces in overwhelming awe.
Close-up: The giant screen behind the CEO flashes the product name in a pristine, minimalist font.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O primeiro cântico religioso: O branding nasce. A estética do objeto (a Caixa Laranja) se torna o foco da adoração, eclipsando sua utilidade real.
lines.core_pt_pt: A marca é uma religião.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O primeiro cântico religioso: o branding nasce. A estética do objeto (a Caixa Laranja) torna-se o foco de adoração, eclipsando a sua utilidade real.

lines.lyric: The baby fire sleeps inside!
lines.real_meaning: The foundational lie: The belief that power resides exclusively within the object, creating the illusion that we are powerless without it.
media_queries: Medium shot: The traveler holds the flame high. The golden light paints the awestruck faces of the tribe.
Close-up: Gralha's face, bathed in the warm light, absolute pure faith and worship replacing his earlier terror.
Extreme close-up: The reflection of the steady flame dancing in Gralha's wide, tear-filled eye.
hidden_media_queries: Medium tracking shot: A line of hundreds of people wrapped around a city block in the freezing rain, waiting outside a glass retail store.
Close-up: A freezing, exhausted customer clutching a thermos, staring longingly at the glowing logo inside the store.
Extreme close-up: The glowing white logo of the brand above the store entrance, a beacon for the faithful.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A mentira fundamental: A crença de que o poder reside exclusivamente no objeto, criando a ilusão de que somos impotentes sem ele.
lines.core_pt_pt: Despido sem o produto.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A mentira fundacional: A crença de que o poder reside exclusivamente no objecto, criando a ilusão de que somos impotentes sem ele.

lines.lyric: THE ORANGE BOX! THE ORANGE BOX!
lines.real_meaning: Dogmatic repetition: Slogans and chants cement belief. Say it enough, and the arbitrary nature of the object becomes unquestionable truth.
media_queries: Wide shot: The tribe collectively falls to their knees around the traveler, swaying, hands raised toward the flickering BIC flame in the darkness.
Medium shot: Gralha chants and points reverently at the orange plastic body of the lighter, worshipping the shell, not the mechanism inside.
Close-up: The traveler's face, a smug accidental god, realizing the immense power they've just stumbled into.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A brightly lit Apple Store on launch day. Customers swarm wooden tables, desperately grabbing at pristine display devices.
Medium shot: A young customer clutches a freshly purchased white box against their chest like a sacred artifact.
Close-up: The customer exits triumphantly, holding the box aloft while the crowd outside cheers.
lines.core_pt: Repita até que a verdade seja inquestionável.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Repetição dogmática: Slogans e cantos consolidam a crença. Diga isso o suficiente, e a natureza arbitrária do objeto se torna uma verdade indiscutível.
lines.core_pt_pt: Repete até que a verdade seja inquestionável.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Repetição dogmática: Lemas e cantigas consolidam a crença. Dizê-lo o suficiente e a natureza arbitrária do objecto torna-se verdade inquestionável.

lines.lyric: We'll run with it, we'll run with pride!
lines.real_meaning: The institutionalization of the hustle: The primal instinct to survive is hijacked into a perpetual race to serve the artifact. The rat race disguised as sacred duty.
media_queries: Wide tracking shot: Three cave dwellers sprint through the dark forest carrying a lit torch between them, embers trailing like orange stars.
Medium shot: A cave dweller stumbles, nearly dropping the torch. Gralha catches the flame, cradling it, running harder.
Close-up: Bare feet pounding ancient earth, the torch's reflection dancing in puddles of rainwater.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A crowded subway car. Every passenger stares down at the same glowing rectangle in their hands, faces lit blue-white.
Medium shot: A teenager sprints down a city sidewalk, phone held high, chasing a GPS signal for a mobile game.
Close-up: A cracked phone screen still glowing, still being used, its owner refusing to let go despite the damage.
lines.core: The rat race disguised as sacred duty.
lines.core_pt: A corrida dos ratos disfarçada de sagrado dever.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A institucionalização do esforço: o instinto primal de sobrevivência é sequestrado em uma corrida perpétua para servir ao artefato. A corrida de ratos disfarçada de dever sagrado.
lines.core_pt_pt: A corrida das ratazanas disfarçada de sagrado dever.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A institucionalização do esforço: O instinto primal de sobrevivência é sequestrado para uma corrida perpétua a servir o artefacto. A corrida das ratazanas disfarçada de sagrado dever.

lines.lyric: I said "The fire lives in here, curled up small and tight
lines.real_meaning: The deliberate creation of caste exclusivity: The Mage invents a false constraint (the fire sleeps inside) to maintain the monopoly of truth.
media_queries: Medium shot: The traveler holds the BIC lighter up to the tribe, pointing at the translucent orange casing. Inside, the butane liquid sloshes faintly.
Close-up: The lighter's transparent body backlit by moonlight. The liquid fuel glows amber, a tiny sleeping dragon curled inside plastic.
Extreme close-up: The metal wheel and flint mechanism of the lighter, an alien machine to the cave dwellers who stare in reverent silence.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: A tech guru on stage at a keynote, gesturing reverently at a giant screen showing the phone's internal chipset diagram.
Close-up: The polished glass back of a smartphone, reflecting studio lights like a black mirror.
Extreme close-up: A circuit board under magnification, golden traces and silicon — the sleeping fire inside the modern box.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A criação deliberada da exclusividade de castas: O Mago inventa uma falsa restrição (o fogo dorme dentro) para manter o monopólio da verdade.
lines.core_pt_pt: Falsas restrições mantêm o monopólio.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A criação deliberada de exclusividade de casta: O Mago inventa uma falsa restrição (o fogo dorme lá dentro) para manter o monopólio da verdade.

lines.lyric: When you go chak-chak, it wakes up, burning bright
lines.real_meaning: The activation ritual: The simple, addictive gesture (chak-chak) that reinforces the illusion of the Mage's divine control over the tool.
media_queries: Close-up: The traveler's thumb strikes the BIC wheel. CHAK-CHAK. Sparks fly. The tiny flame erupts, painting every face in warm orange.
Wide shot: The entire tribe gasps and recoils as the flame appears from nothing. Children cling to their mothers. Warriors grip their spears.
Medium shot: Gralha reaches toward the flame with trembling fingers, mesmerized, his pupils reflecting twin points of fire.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A finger swipes across a phone screen. The display ignites with color — apps, notifications, a whole universe awakening.
Wide shot: A dark bedroom. A teenager's face is suddenly illuminated by the phone screen's cold blue glow, the only light.
Medium shot: The teenager scrolls hypnotically, dopamine-drunk, unable to look away from the cascading feed of content.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O ritual de ativação: o gesto simples e viciante (chak-chak) que reforça a ilusão do controle divino do Mago sobre a ferramenta.
lines.core_pt_pt: O vício ritual de ativação.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O ritual de ativação: O simples e viciante gesto (chak-chak) que reforça a ilusão do controle divino do Mago sobre a ferramenta.

lines.lyric: You have to run, you have to race, carry it with care
lines.real_meaning: The urgency economy: Inventing false scarcity and arbitrary rules (you must run) to keep the followers busy, anxious, and compliant.
media_queries: Wide tracking shot: A cave dweller runs through rain with a burning branch, shielding it with their body. Behind them, the old fire pit dies.
Medium shot: The runner's hands cup around the fragile flame as wind threatens to extinguish it. Desperation on their face.
Close-up: A single ember clinging to the end of a twig, glowing orange against the vast, dark prehistoric night.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A student rushes across a university campus, phone at 2% battery, searching frantically for a charging outlet.
Medium shot: The student finds a wall socket, plugs in with trembling hands, watches the battery icon appear — relief floods their face.
Close-up: A phone charging cable plugged in, the tiny LED glowing green. The modern fire relay.
lines.core_pt: A escassez falsa faz você correr.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A economia da urgência: Inventar falsas escassezes e regras arbitrárias (você deve correr) para manter os seguidores ocupados, ansiosos e conformes.
lines.core_pt_pt: A falsa escassez faz-te correr.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A economia da urgência: Inventar falsas escassezes e regras arbitrárias (tens de correr) para manter os seguidores ocupados, ansiosos e conformados.

lines.lyric: To the new pile, to the new place, before it disappears in air"
lines.real_meaning: The perpetual motion of blind faith: Move fast, chase the trend, sprint to the next pile before the illusion of meaning evaporates.
media_queries: Wide shot: The cave dweller reaches the new fire pit just in time, touching the dying ember to dry kindling. It catches. A new fire blooms.
Medium shot: The tribe erupts in celebration around the new fire. Dancing shadows on cave walls. The cycle of fire continues.
Close-up: New flames licking upward from fresh wood, the ancient relay complete, warmth returning to cold faces.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A data center at night, rows of servers blinking, the eternal fire of the internet humming in air-conditioned darkness.
Medium shot: A cloud backup completing on a phone screen — '100% synced'. The data fire transferred to its new pile.
Close-up: A loading bar reaching completion, the digital relay finished, information preserved in silicon forever.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O movimento perpétuo da fé cega: Avance rápido, siga a tendência, corra para a próxima pilha antes que a ilusão de significado evapore.
lines.core_pt_pt: Corre para a próxima tendência.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O movimento perpétuo da fé cega: Move-te depressa, persegue a tendência, corre para o próximo monte antes que a ilusão de significado se evapore.

lines.lyric: THE ORANGE BOX! THE ORANGE BOX!
lines.real_meaning: The brand loyalty hardens into tribal identity. To question the Orange Box is to become an outcast of the tribe.
media_queries: Wide shot: A massive bonfire now roars at the center of the camp. Thirty tribe members circle it, chanting, arms raised in synchronized worship.
Medium shot: Gralha stands on a raised rock, leading the chant, face painted with ceremonial ash. Behind him, the traveler watches uneasily.
Close-up: Multiple BIC lighters laid out on a flat stone like sacred relics on an altar, each one a sleeping god.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A packed convention center. Thousands in matching branded t-shirts, holding phones up, recording a keynote speech.
Medium shot: A massive LED screen shows a new product reveal. The crowd erupts, tears streaming, as if witnessing a miracle.
Close-up: Hundreds of phone screens in the crowd, all displaying the same livestream — a hall of mirrors reflecting worship.
lines.core_pt: Questione a marca, torne-se um marginal.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A lealdade à marca endurece-se em identidade tribal. Questionar a Orange Box é tornar-se um forasteiro da tribo.
lines.core_pt_pt: Põe em causa a marca, torna-te paria.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A lealdade à marca endurece-se numa identidade tribal. Questionar a Orange Box é tornar-se um proscrito da tribo.

lines.lyric: The baby fire sleeps inside!
lines.real_meaning: The myth internalizes: The product is no longer just a tool; it is perceived as a living, breathing necessity that demands our constant attention.
media_queries: Close-up: A child cave dweller holds a BIC lighter reverently, pressing it to their ear, listening for the sleeping fire's breath.
Medium shot: An elder cave dweller cradles the orange box, rocking it gently like an infant, singing a lullaby to the flame spirit.
Extreme close-up: The BIC lighter's transparent body, butane sloshing inside — a tiny ocean of potential fire, dormant and waiting.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A toddler's small hands gripping a tablet, watching a colorful animation, already indoctrinated into the screen ritual.
Medium shot: A parent hands their crying child a phone. The child instantly stops crying, mesmerized by the glowing screen.
Extreme close-up: A child's wide pupils reflecting cartoon colors from the tablet, the next generation of believers already converted.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O mito internaliza: O produto não é mais apenas uma ferramenta; ele é percebido como uma necessidade viva e respirante que exige nossa atenção constante.
lines.core_pt_pt: O produto exige atenção constante.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O mito internaliza-se: O produto já não é apenas uma ferramenta; é percebido como uma necessidade viva e respirante que exige a nossa atenção constante.

lines.lyric: THE ORANGE BOX! THE ORANGE BOX!
lines.real_meaning: The viral loop of dogma: Shared delusion becomes societal law. The chant ensures that no one stops to question the absurdity of the race.
media_queries: Wide shot: Three separate bonfires now burn across the valley. The tribe has expanded. Drums beat. Smoke columns rise into the starlit sky.
Medium shot: A procession of cave dwellers marches between the fires, carrying torches. Gralha leads them with the orange box held overhead.
Close-up: The traveler sits alone on a rock, watching the growing cult they accidentally created, horror dawning in their eyes.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A sprawling tech campus at dusk, glass buildings glowing from within. Employees walk in synchronized streams toward the main hall.
Medium shot: A CEO walks on stage, silhouetted against a giant glowing logo. The audience rises to their feet before a word is spoken.
Close-up: The CEO's face, calm, messianic, perfectly lit — a modern prophet delivering scripture to the faithful.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O loop viral do dogma: A delusão compartilhada se torna lei social. O canto garante que ninguém pare para questionar a absurdidade da corrida.
lines.core_pt_pt: Delírio partilhado torna-se lei.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O ciclo viral do dogma: A delusão partilhada torna-se lei social. O cântico assegura que ninguém pare para questionar a absurdidade da corrida.

lines.lyric: We'll run with it, we'll run with pride!
lines.real_meaning: Pride in servitude: Exhaustion is rebranded as virtue. Wearing the endless hustle as a badge of honor to prove one's devotion.
media_queries: Wide tracking shot: A relay of six runners now, passing the torch through the valley. Each hand-off is performed with ritual precision.
Medium shot: A young cave dweller sprints with the fire, face lit with ecstatic pride. They believe they are carrying a god.
Close-up: The torch flame reflected in a river's surface as the runner leaps across stepping stones, fire above water.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A viral trend spreading — split-screen of dozens doing the same dance, same filter, same music, passed from phone to phone.
Medium shot: A teenager films themselves with the phone, adding to the chain, their individuality dissolved into the collective ritual.
Close-up: A 'share' button being pressed. The digital fire relay — one tap, a million new flames.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Orgulho na servidão: O cansaço é rebrandado como virtude. Usar a correria interminável como um distintivo de honra para provar a devoção de alguém.
lines.core_pt_pt: Exaustão rebrandizada como virtude.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Orgulho na servidão: O cansaço é rebrandado como virtude. Usar a agitação incessante como um distintivo de honra para provar a devoção de alguém.

lines.lyric: And that's how I became a god
lines.real_meaning: The tech billionaire moment: Earning godhood not through wisdom, but through holding the monopoly on a simple, misunderstood technology.
media_queries: Wide shot: The traveler sits on a throne of stacked stones, tribe members bowing before them. Animal pelts draped as royal garments.
Medium shot: Gralha places a crown of antlers and feathers on the traveler's head. The traveler looks bewildered, trapped in divinity.
Close-up: The traveler's eyes — a mix of terror and intoxication, realizing there is no going back from godhood.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A tech billionaire's penthouse apartment, floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a city that runs on their platform.
Medium shot: The billionaire sits in a minimalist chair, scrolling through their own trending mentions, a faint smile of power.
Close-up: A Forbes magazine cover with the billionaire's face. Accidental deity.
lines.core_pt: Deusidade através de monopólio, não sabedoria.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O momento do bilionário da tecnologia: Conquistando a divindade não através da sabedoria, mas através do monopólio sobre uma tecnologia simples e mal compreendida.
lines.core_pt_pt: Deusidade através de monopólio, não de sabedoria.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O momento do bilionário da tecnologia: a alcançar a divindade não através da sabedoria, mas através de controlar o monopólio de uma tecnologia simples e mal compreendida.

lines.lyric: With a plastic BIC and a nod
lines.real_meaning: The absurdity of modern godhood: The tools of power are mundane and cheap (a plastic BIC), but elevated by human gullibility.
media_queries: Close-up: The BIC lighter sits on the stone altar, surrounded by offerings of fruit, bones, and flowers. A plastic god among organic tributes.
Medium shot: The traveler demonstrates the lighter again — CHAK-CHAK — and the tribe erupts anew. The nod confirms the miracle.
Extreme close-up: The traveler's slight, knowing nod after sparking the lighter. A gesture so small, yet it founded a religion.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A brand logo etched into glass, backlit, perfect — the corporate altar where consumers leave their money as offerings.
Medium shot: A product designer nods approval at a prototype. That nod will determine what billions carry in their pockets.
Extreme close-up: A 'Terms and Conditions' accept button. The modern nod of consent — unread, unquestioned, absolute.
lines.core_pt: Um deus de plástico entre oferendas.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A absurdidade da divindade moderna: As ferramentas do poder são mundanas e baratas (uma caneta BIC de plástico), mas elevadas pela ingenuidade humana.
lines.core_pt_pt: Um deus de plástico entre ofertas.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A absurda divindade moderna: As ferramentas do poder são mundanas e baratas (um BIC de plástico), mas elevadas pela credulidade humana.

lines.lyric: Twelve believers, faithful, true
lines.real_meaning: The early adopters: Every cult and speculative bubble starts with a small, devoted group willing to suspend their disbelief.
media_queries: Wide shot: Twelve cave dwellers sit in a circle around the fire, cross-legged, faces solemn. The first congregation.
Medium shot: Each of the twelve holds a small stone painted orange. Their first sacred tokens, made in the image of the lighter.
Close-up: Twelve pairs of eyes reflecting firelight, unblinking, converted, willing to die for the orange box.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: Twelve founding employees in a garage, laptops open, coding the platform that will reshape human connection.
Medium shot: A whiteboard in the garage showing 'Mission: Connect the World.' Twelve true believers writing the digital gospel.
Close-up: Twelve coffee cups on a table, each person committed to the vision, pulling all-nighters to build the church.
lines.core: Every cult starts with twelve believers.
lines.core_pt: Todo culto começa com doze crentes.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Os primeiros adotantes: Toda seita e bolha especulativa começa com um pequeno grupo devotado disposto a suspender sua descrença.
lines.core_pt_pt: Todo culto começa com doze crentes.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Os primeiros a adoptar: Cada culto e bolha especulativa começa com um pequeno grupo devoto, disposto a suspender a sua descrença.

lines.lyric: Gralha said "I'll translate for you"
lines.real_meaning: The first middle-man: Gralha becomes the PR department, the priest who monetizes access to the Mage's 'truth' by interpreting it for the masses.
media_queries: Medium shot: Gralha stands between the traveler and the tribe, arms wide, interpreting the 'divine message' with dramatic gestures.
Close-up: Gralha's face as he speaks to the tribe — adding his own embellishments, twisting the traveler's simple words into prophecy.
Over-the-shoulder shot: Watching Gralha preach to the tribe, realizing the message has already been corrupted in translation.
hidden_media_queries: Medium shot: A tech journalist at a press conference, rephrasing the CEO's announcement into sensational headlines for clicks.
Close-up: A blog post being written: 'Why This Changes Everything' — the modern Gralha translating tech into religion.
Over-the-shoulder shot: A social media manager scheduling posts, packaging corporate jargon into emotional narratives.
lines.core_pt: O primeiro intermediário monetiza o acesso.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O primeiro intermediário: Gralha se torna o departamento de relações públicas, o sacerdote que monetiza o acesso à 'verdade' do Mago, interpretando-a para as massas.
lines.core_pt_pt: O primeiro intermediário monetiza o acesso.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O primeiro intermediário: Gralha torna-se o departamento de RP, o sacerdote que monetiza o acesso à 'verdade' do Mago, interpretando-a para as massas.

lines.lyric: THE ORANGE BOX! THE ORANGE BOX!
lines.real_meaning: Market saturation: The cult becomes culture. The chant is inescapable, and non-participation is no longer an option.
media_queries: Wide shot: The entire valley ablaze with dozens of bonfires. Hundreds of cave dwellers dance in frenzy. The sky glows orange with smoke and flame.
Medium shot: Gralha, wearing a necklace of orange-painted stones, leads a war dance around the central fire, spear raised.
Close-up: The original BIC lighter sits on the stone altar, almost invisible among the chaos it created. The seed of an empire.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: Times Square at night, every surface a glowing screen, thousands walking while staring at phones, illuminated zombies.
Medium shot: A teenager surrounded by five screens — phone, tablet, laptop, monitor, TV — all showing different content simultaneously.
Close-up: Bloodshot eyes reflected in a phone screen at 3 AM, unable to stop scrolling, the digital bonfire consuming all sleep.
lines.core: Non-participation is no longer an option.
lines.core_pt: A não participação já não é mais uma opção.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Saturação do mercado: o culto se torna cultura. O cântico é inescapável, e a não participação não é mais uma opção.
lines.core_pt_pt: A não participação já não é uma opção.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Saturação do mercado: O culto torna-se cultura. O cântico é inescapável e a não participação já não é uma opção.

lines.lyric: The baby fire sleeps inside!
lines.real_meaning: The mythology solidifies: Cultivating the fear that without our constant, frantic participation, the 'magic' of civilization will die.
media_queries: Close-up: Dozens of hand-carved stone replicas of the BIC lighter, each cradled by a tribe member. The first mass-produced religious icons.
Medium shot: A mother teaches her child the CHAK-CHAK motion with two stones, passing down the sacred gesture to the next generation.
Extreme close-up: A cave painting being drawn on the wall — a crude rectangle with a flame on top. The lighter, immortalized in art.
hidden_media_queries: Close-up: A box of old phones in a drawer — each once worshipped, now discarded, replaced by the newer model.
Medium shot: An e-waste recycling facility, mountains of dead phones and tablets, the graveyard of yesterday's gods.
Extreme close-up: A cracked, dead phone screen in the garbage. A faint reflection of the sky — the fire has moved on.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A mitologia se solidifica: Cultivando o medo de que, sem nossa participação constante e frenética, a 'mágica' da civilização morrerá.
lines.core_pt_pt: Sem nós, a magia morre.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A mitologia solidifica-se: Cultivando o medo de que, sem a nossa participação constante e frenética, a 'magia' da civilização morrerá.

lines.lyric: THE ORANGE BOX! THE ORANGE BOX!
lines.real_meaning: The echo chamber of the faithful: The collective chanting drowns out any individual skepticism. The tribe is united by shared hallucination.
media_queries: Wide shot: A stone temple stands where the first fire was lit. Carved pillars depict the lighter. The tribe has become a civilization.
Medium shot: Inside the temple, priests in orange-dyed robes perform the CHAK-CHAK ritual over a stone altar, the lighter long gone but the ritual eternal.
Close-up: An ancient cave painting on the temple wall showing the traveler arriving from the green phone booth. History becoming mythology.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A gleaming corporate headquarters shaped like a ring, a temple to the digital fire built by millions of believers.
Medium shot: Inside the HQ, a museum displays every product generation behind glass, sacred relics of innovation.
Close-up: A bronze statue of the founder in the lobby, hands clasped, gazing forward. The accidental mage, immortalized in metal.
lines.core_pt: Câmara de eco afoga todo o ceticismo.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A câmara de eco dos fiéis: o canto coletivo abafa qualquer ceticismo individual. A tribo é unida por uma alucinação compartilhada.
lines.core_pt_pt: Câmara de eco afoga todo o ceticismo.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A câmara de eco dos fiéis: O cântico coletivo abafa qualquer cepticismo individual. A tribo está unida por uma alucinação partilhada.

lines.lyric: We'll run with it, we'll run with pride!
lines.real_meaning: The institutional hustle: It's no longer passion, it's infrastructure. The 'run' is now the entire basis of the economy and social standing.
