media_queries: Wide tracking shot: An army of torch-bearers floods the valley, hundreds of flames creating a river of fire across the dark landscape.
Medium shot: The traveler watches from a hilltop, overwhelmed. What started as a single CHAK-CHAK has become an unstoppable wildfire of belief.
Close-up: A single tear rolls down the traveler's face, reflecting all the fires below. Pride, guilt, and terror in one drop.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A satellite image of Earth at night, every continent traced in electric light. The fire relay went global.
Medium shot: A child in a developing nation holds a cracked smartphone, connecting to the same internet. The last fire pit reached.
Close-up: A notification counter on a phone showing '7 billion connected.' The modern fire relay, complete.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A agitação institucional: Não é mais paixão, é infraestrutura. A 'corrida' agora é a base inteira da economia e do status social.
lines.core_pt_pt: Infrastrutura já, não paixão.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A agitação institucional: Já não é paixão, é infraestrutura. A 'corrida' é agora a base inteira da economia e do estatuto social.

lines.lyric: Run, run, don't let it die!
lines.real_meaning: The imperative of the rat race: Keep moving, keep consuming, keep running. To stop is to let the illusion die, exposing the emptiness.
media_queries: Wide shot: Dawn breaks over the valley of fires. The traveler stands at the edge of the green phone booth, hand on the door, looking back.
Medium shot: Gralha runs toward the traveler, reaching out, desperate. But the door is closing. The god is leaving.
Close-up: The phone booth door shuts. Through the green glass, the traveler's face — relief and loss. The fire will burn without them.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: A server farm humming in the arctic, autonomous, self-sustaining. The digital fire no longer needs its creator.
Medium shot: The original garage where it all started, now empty, a 'For Lease' sign on the door. The founders have moved on.
Close-up: A phone screen showing 'Update Available.' The fire never stops. Run, run, don't let it die.
lines.core: Keep consuming or the illusion dies.
lines.core_pt: Continue consumindo ou a ilusão morre.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O imperativo da corrida dos ratos: Continue se movendo, continue consumindo, continue correndo. Parar é deixar a ilusão morrer, expondo o vazio.
lines.core_pt_pt: Continua a consumir ou a ilusão morre.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O imperativo da corrida de ratos: Continua a mover-te, continua a consumir, continua a correr. Parar é deixar morrer a ilusão, expondo o vazio.

lines.lyric: Next morning, Gralha lit the flame
lines.real_meaning: The daily ritual begins: The Monday morning alarm. The start of the perpetual sprint to serve the artificial system we've created.
media_queries: Wide shot: Dawn breaks over the valley. The tribe is asleep in the cave. Gralha is already awake, standing over the dead fire pit.
Medium shot: Gralha strikes the BIC lighter. The small flame illuminates his determined, soot-stained face.
Close-up: Gralha eagerly grabs a torched branch, touching it to the BIC flame until the branch catches fire.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: 5:45 AM. A sprawling, bleak cityscape wrapped in the pre-dawn cold. A single high-rise apartment window suddenly lights up.
Close-up: The harsh, red digital numbers of an alarm clock flashing 5:45.
Medium shot: The professional hits the alarm, immediately sitting up like a trained soldier responding to a drill.
lines.core_pt: O alarme da manhã de segunda-feira.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O ritual diário começa: o alarme de segunda-feira de manhã. O início da corrida perpétua para servir o sistema artificial que criamos.
lines.core_pt_pt: O despertador da manhã de segunda-feira.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O ritual diário começa: o alarme de segunda-feira de manhã. O início da corrida perpétua a servir o sistema artificial que criámos.

lines.lyric: Chak-chak, a tiny light
lines.real_meaning: The spark of the daily grind: The notification ping, the login screen. The tiny prompt that commands us to start running again.
media_queries: Wide shot: Gralha sprints out of the cave entrance, holding the flaming torch high above his head.
Medium tracking shot: Gralha running through the tall dew-soaked grass, the wind whipping his face, absolute focus in his eyes.
Over-the-shoulder shot: Looking past Gralha's shoulder at the flaming torch as he runs toward the distant horizon.
hidden_media_queries: Wide tracking shot: The professional sprinting down the damp sidewalk, tie flapping carelessly, desperately racing toward the subway entrance.
Medium shot: The subway doors begin to slide shut. The professional throws their briefcase in to block them, squeezing through.
Close-up: The professional gasping for breath against the subway door, checking their glowing smartwatch.
lines.core_pt: A notificação ordena: comece a correr.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O estalo da rotina diária: o som de notificação, a tela de login. O pequeno prompt que nos manda começar a correr novamente.
lines.core_pt_pt: A notificação manda: começa a correr.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O estalar da rotina diária: o ping da notificação, o ecrã de login. O pequeno aviso que nos manda a correr outra vez.

lines.lyric: "Now I run!" he said, and came
lines.real_meaning: Voluntary slavery disguised as ambition: The worker sprints for the commute, fully convinced their exhaustion is a noble pursuit.
media_queries: Wide shot: The rest of the tribe emerges from the cave, watching Gralha run. They begin to cheer enthusiastically.
Medium shot: The tribe starts jogging after him, forming a messy procession of followers mesmerized by the running flame.
Close-up: The Mage sits back on his throne, watching the pointless marathon begin with a look of mild amusement.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The open-plan corporate office. Hundreds of screens glowing. The professional power-walks to their cubicle.
Medium shot: The professional aggressively typing, fueled by cold coffee and pure panic.
Extreme close-up: The engagement metrics on a dashboard slowly ticking downward despite the frantic typing.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Escravidão voluntária disfarçada de ambição: O trabalhador corre para o trajeto, completamente convencido de que seu esgotamento é uma busca nobre.
lines.core_pt_pt: Escravatura voluntária disfarçada de ambição.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Escravidão voluntária disfarçada de ambição: O trabalhador corre para o autocarro, completamente convencido de que o seu cansaço é uma nobre perseguição.

lines.lyric: Running with all his might
lines.real_meaning: The cult of productivity: Giving everything to a meaningless task. Sprinting frantically without ever questioning the destination.
media_queries: Medium tracking shot: Gralha breathing heavily, sweat pouring down his face, the torch beginning to flicker wildly in the wind.
Extreme close-up: The flame on the torch weakening, struggling against the strong dawn breeze.
Close-up: Gralha's eyes widen in panic as he realizes the fire is dying. He pushes himself to run even faster.

lines.real_meaning_pt: Esperando a próxima Muda: A pedra espera pela próxima pessoa corajosa o suficiente para sair da esteira, parar de correr e atacar.
lines.core_pt_pt: À espera do próximo Muda.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: À espera do próximo Muda: A pedra espera pela próxima pessoa corajosa o suficiente para sair da esteira, parar de correr e dar o golpe.

lines.lyric: Waiting for someone to remember...
lines.real_meaning: The quiet power of reality: Knowing that whenever we are ready to drop the empty plastic, the real fire is still exactly where we left it.
media_queries: A vast prehistoric landscape at dusk, a solitary couch sits under a starry sky, a firepit smoldering nearby.
A figure sits on the couch, staring into the dying embers of a campfire, the glow illuminating their face.
The figure's eyes reflect the warmth of the embers, a look of anticipation and hope.
hidden_media_queries: A sprawling cityscape at dawn, a single phone lies face-down on a bench, untouched.
A busy morning train, a commuter's reflection in the window, eyes fixed on a glowing screen.
A clenched fist on a steel railing, waiting, a hint of a wildflower in the corner.
lines.core: Drop the plastic. Strike the stone.
lines.core_pt: Deixe o plástico. Bata na pedra.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O poder silencioso da realidade: Saber que, sempre que estamos prontos para largar o plástico vazio, o fogo real ainda está exatamente onde o deixamos.
lines.core_pt_pt: Deixa o plástico. Bate na pedra.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A calma força da realidade: Saber que, sempre que estivermos prontos a largar o plástico vazio, o verdadeiro fogo está exatamente onde o deixámos.

lines.lyric: When I got home, I sat on the couch and stared at the ceiling. The hedgehog chewing on my shoes.
lines.real_meaning: Full circle: We return to the beginning, but now armed with the heavy understanding of the pattern. The same cycle of blind obedience — the Revolution still bites the shoes.
media_queries: Wide shot: The traveler stands up and walks to the window, looking out over the sprawling, glowing city.
Medium shot: The traveler looks from the city back to the smartphone, shaking their head at the absurdity of it all.
Close-up: The traveler purposefully turns the smartphone face down on the table, silencing it.
hidden_media_queries: Wide shot: The user's apartment. Stripped of excess screens. Quiet, analog, calm.
Medium shot: The phone sits face-down on a bookshelf, gathering dust. Not destroyed, just ignored.
Close-up: The user writing in a physical notebook with a pen. The scratch of ink on paper.
lines.core: Back where we started. Now we understand.
lines.core_pt: De volta ao ponto de partida. Agora entendemos.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Ciclo completo: Voltamos ao início, mas agora armados com a pesada compreensão do padrão. O mesmo ciclo de obediência cega — a Revolução ainda morde os sapatos.
lines.core_pt_pt: De volta ao ponto de partida. Agora percebemos.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Círculo completo: Voltamos ao início, mas agora armados com a pesada compreensão do padrão. O mesmo ciclo de obediência cega — a Revolução ainda morde os sapatos.

lines.lyric: And I thought... fuck. It's always the same shit.
lines.real_meaning: The blunt epiphany: Stripped of all grand poetry, the truth is profane. We just never learn. Different tools, different centuries, same blind faith. Always the same.
media_queries: A vast prehistoric landscape at sunset, a lone figure standing near a cave entrance, firelight flickering.
The figure sits alone, tool in hand, staring intently into the darkness, a fire burning nearby.
A close-up of the figure's face, eyes reflecting the fire, expression weary and resigned.
hidden_media_queries: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, a single smartphone lying untouched on a windowsill.
A cluttered apartment with a child playing with a stone, phone laying on the coffee table.
up of a person staring at their hands, the stone at their feet.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A epifania brutal: Despojada de toda grande poesia, a verdade é profana. Nós simplesmente nunca aprendemos. Ferramentas diferentes, séculos diferentes, a mesma fé cega. Sempre a mesma coisa.
lines.core_pt_pt: Nós nunca aprendemos.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A epifania crua: Despojada de toda a grande poesia, a verdade é profana. Nós simplesmente nunca aprendemos. Ferramentas diferentes, séculos diferentes, a mesma fé cega. Sempre a mesma.

lines.lyric: The lighter was just a lighter. But they made it a totem. A symbol of power. A reason for war.
lines.real_meaning: The arc of civilization in six words: The tool becomes a symbol, becomes a totem, becomes a weapon. Money and ideology are just lighters without gas.
media_queries: A vast prehistoric valley at sunset, volcanoes smolder in the distance. Warm hues paint the sky. Cinematic.
Around a campfire, a group huddles, shadows dance on weathered faces. Tool in hand. Dramatic.
A hand holds a stone tool, firelight reflects in the eyes. Intimate, painterly.
hidden_media_queries: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, a single smartphone lies untouched on a windowsill, cool blue light reflected on the glass.
A hand reaches for a pocket, but hesitates, fingers brushing against the cool metal of a pocket lighter.
Two hands clasped together, one holding a pocket lighter, the other a rock, cool tones, stark contrast, cinematic.
lines.core_pt: Ferramenta se torna totem se torna arma.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O arco da civilização em seis palavras: A ferramenta se torna um símbolo, se torna um totem, se torna uma arma. Dinheiro e ideologia são apenas isqueiros sem gás.
lines.core_pt_pt: Ferramenta torna-se totem torna-se arma.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O arco da civilização em seis palavras: A ferramenta torna-se um símbolo, torna-se um totem, torna-se uma arma. Dinheiro e ideologia são apenas isqueiros sem gas.

lines.lyric: And today, thousands of years later, what's changed?
lines.real_meaning: The question that echoes through time: Despite all our skyscrapers, servers, and algorithms, what has fundamentally changed about the human condition?
media_queries: A vast prehistoric landscape at dusk, with a distant fire glowing in the twilight.
A cave dweller strikes flint against stone, sparking flames.
The man's eyes reflect the firelight, questioning.
hidden_media_queries: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, a smartphone sits untouched on a windowsill, cool blue light reflecting on the glass.
A cluttered apartment, a man sits on the couch, looking at his hands, with a stone on the table, a phone is on the coffee table.
Two hands meeting, fingers intertwining, a smooth stone rests on the ground, close up.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A pergunta que ecoa pelo tempo: Apesar de todos os nossos arranha-céus, servidores e algoritmos, o que mudou fundamentalmente na condição humana?
lines.core_pt_pt: O que mudou fundamentalmente?
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A questão que ecoa ao longo do tempo: Apesar de todos os nossos arranha-céus, servidores e algoritmos, o que é que mudou, de facto, na condição humana?

lines.lyric: Nothing.
lines.real_meaning: The single-word verdict, updated: Nothing. We are technological giants but psychological infants. The paleolithic brain now rules through silicon instead of stone. Same masters, new masks.
media_queries: A vast prehistoric landscape at sunset. Volcanic peaks, a sprawling forest, and a herd of wild horses. A small cave at the edge of a cliff.
A lone prehistoric man, his back to the viewer, stands with a lighter in his hand.  He looks at the cave's fire pit.  The shadows of the cave play on the walls.
A tight close-up of the man's hand, holding a lighter, but unable to light it.
hidden_media_queries: A sprawling cityscape at night, neon lights reflecting on rain-soaked streets. A phone sits untouched on a windowsill.
A cluttered apartment with a sleek, black phone on a wooden table, next to a dusty museum exhibit.
A child's hands, smudged with dirt, clutching a smooth, gray stone from the beach.
lines.core: Nothing. Same blind faith. New screens.
lines.core_pt: Nada. A mesma fé cega. Novas telas.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O veredicto de uma palavra, atualizado: Nada. Somos gigantes tecnológicos, mas infantes psicológicos. O cérebro paleolítico agora reina através do silício em vez de pedra. Os mesmos mestres, novas máscaras.
lines.core_pt_pt: Nada. A mesma fé cega. Novos ecrãs.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O veredicto em uma palavra, atualizado: Nada. Somos gigantes tecnológicos mas infantes psicológicos. O cérebro paleolítico agora reina através do silício em vez de pedra. Os mesmos mestres, novas máscaras.

lines.lyric: The modern Gralha still shouts: 'But the Mage said it was transport!'
lines.real_meaning: This time is different: The lighter has become an AI that learns, adapts, and replaces. And the ones who own it aren't sharing the fire — they're selling you back your own sparks.
media_queries: A vast, prehistoric valley at dusk, with a lone figure standing beside a cave entrance, firelight flickering in the distance.
The figure, hunched, holding a primitive stone tool, striking sparks into a pile of kindling, shadows dancing wildly.
The figure's clenched jaw, eyes wide with frustration, a small cut on the index finger.
hidden_media_queries: Aerial view of a sprawling cityscape at dusk, a smartphone lies untouched on a balcony rail, cool blue hues reflecting off glass buildings.
A teenager sits on a couch, eyes glued to a blank screen, hands frozen in mid-air, as a museum of old phones flickers behind him.
A close-up of a person's face, tense and anxious,  eyes darting left to right, as they stare at a blank phone screen.
lines.core: But now the tool thinks. And it's not yours.
lines.core_pt: Agora a ferramenta pensa. E não é sua.
lines.real_meaning_pt: Desta vez é diferente: o isqueiro se tornou uma IA que aprende, se adapta e substitui. E os que o possuem não estão compartilhando o fogo — eles estão vendendo de volta seus próprios faíscas.
lines.core_pt_pt: Mas agora a ferramenta pensa. E não é tua.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: Esta vez é diferente: o isqueiro tornou-se uma IA que aprende, adapta e substitui. E os que o possuem não estão a partilhar o fogo — estão a vender-te os teus próprios faíscas.

lines.lyric: And the modern Tronco replies: 'Yeah, but the Mage's lighter was orange and I want a blue one!'
lines.real_meaning: The clearest truth of our time: It should be you and your AI working for the company — not you toiling alongside the company's AI, which was built to replace you. Know the difference. It's everything.
media_queries: Widespread prehistoric valley at dusk, volcanic smoke, firepit glow, silhouette of a lone figure.
Man holding a stone tool, looking at fire, modern lighter in the dirt, fire reflected in his eyes.
up of the figure's hands, one holding the stone tool, the other the modern lighter.
hidden_media_queries: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, a sleek smartphone lies untouched on a modern balcony.
Two individuals in a minimalist apartment, arguing intensely, phones nowhere to be seen.
A close-up of hands gesturing, fingers splayed wide and tense, with a bright blue lighter.
lines.core: You and YOUR AI. Not you and THEIR AI.
lines.core_pt: Você e SEU IA. Não você e A ELE.
lines.real_meaning_pt: A verdade mais clara do nosso tempo: Deveria ser você e sua IA trabalhando para a empresa — e não você trabalhando ao lado da IA da empresa, que foi construída para substituir você. Saiba a diferença. É tudo.
lines.core_pt_pt: Tu e a tua IA. Não tu e a deles IA.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A verdade mais clara do nosso tempo: Deveria ser tu e a tua IA a trabalhar para a empresa — não tu a trabalhar ao lado da IA da empresa, que foi construída para te substituir. Conhece a diferença. É tudo.

lines.lyric: The fire is still there. Waiting.
lines.real_meaning: The call to action: Take control. Build with AI on your terms — partner with it, don't serve it. The tool is just a tool, like the flint stone. But if you keep sleepwalking, the tech overlords will consume us whole.
media_queries: Vast prehistoric valley at dusk, fires burning, smoke rising.
A figure stands motionless near a fire, the lighter still in hand.
up of the figure's eyes, reflecting the embers, awaiting action.
hidden_media_queries: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, a smartphone sits untouched on a table in an apartment. Cool urban lights reflect off the screen.
A child on a beach, striking two stones together, sparks fly. The child is looking at the ocean.
Close up of a hand holding a stone, the stone has been used to strike another. The hand is at the beach.
lines.core: Own your fire. Wake up. Or they eat us whole.
lines.core_pt: Aproveite seu fogo. Acorde. Ou eles nos devoram inteiros.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O chamado à ação: Tome o controle. Construa com IA nos seus termos — faça parceria com ela, não a sirva. A ferramenta é apenas uma ferramenta, como a pedra lascada. Mas se você continuar andando sonâmbulo, os senhores da tecnologia nos consumirão por completo.
lines.core_pt_pt: Sê dono do teu fogo. Acorda. Ou eles comem-nos inteiros.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: O apelo à ação: Toma o controlo. Constrói com IA aos teus termos — parceira com ela, não a sirvas. A ferramenta é apenas uma ferramenta, como a pedra lascada. Mas se continuares a andar a dormir, os senhores da tecnologia vão consumir-nos por completo.

lines.lyric: Waiting for someone to remember to strike the stone.
lines.real_meaning: The album's final truth: Stop running their race. Look down at what's already in your hands. Strike your own fire. The answer was never in the cloud — it was always at your feet. Chak-chak.
media_queries: A vast prehistoric landscape at dawn, smoke from fires rising into the sky.
A lone figure huddled by a dying fire, face illuminated by warm, flickering light.
A close-up of hands, calloused and worn, holding a stone ready to strike the stone to make fire.
hidden_media_queries: A bustling cityscape at dusk, a sleek smartphone sits untouched on a windowsill, cool blues and purples dominate the scene.
A modern apartment interior, a young person sits on a couch, eyes glued to a blank wall, a phone lies untouched on the coffee table.
A close-up of a hand, slowly reaching for a phone, then hesitates and turns to the ground. A stone is at the feet.
lines.core_pt: Pare. Olhe para baixo. Ataque. Chak-chak.
lines.real_meaning_pt: O verdadeiro final do álbum: Pare de correr a corrida deles. Olhe para baixo para o que já está em suas mãos. Acenda seu próprio fogo. A resposta nunca estava na nuvem — sempre esteve aos seus pés. Chak-chak.
lines.core_pt_pt: Pára. Olha para baixo. Bate. Chak-chak.
lines.real_meaning_pt_pt: A verdade final do álbum: Para de correr a corrida deles. Olha para baixo e vê o que já tens nas tuas mãos. Acende o teu próprio fogo. A resposta nunca esteve na nuvem — sempre esteve aos teus pés. Chak-chak.
